properties.description: Geospatial ML pipeline over Microsoft's 129M U.S. buildings dataset, applying 5-stage geometry filtering to surface 11,577 commercial rooftop candidates with viability score >= 70. LLM-powered report generator using Gemini 2.0 Flash and LangChain, synthesizing geospatial scores, 30-year precipitation data, and viability metrics into investor-ready briefs.
properties.what_it_is: End-to-end geospatial ML pipeline to identify commercial rooftop candidates for water-reuse systems. Processed Microsoft's 129M U.S. buildings dataset.
properties.how_it_works: Geometry filtering algorithm (bounding box validation, area thresholding, roof pitch estimation, shadow/obstruction analysis, commercial zoning check) narrows 129M buildings to viable candidates. Multi-dimensional scoring integrates 30-year NOAA precipitation normals, building geometry, and location viability. LLM-powered brief generator (Gemini 2.0 Flash + LangChain) synthesizes scores and data into investor-ready reports.

properties.tagline: Winner Best Software at Headstarter Hack
properties.description: Multimodal agentic browser using LangGraph and GPT-4V, enabling autonomous web navigation through vision-based page understanding and Playwright-driven action execution across multi-step user tasks.
properties.achievement: Winner Best Software at Headstarter Hack 2025
properties.what_it_is: Autonomous browser agent that takes screenshots of web pages, understands visual content using GPT-4V, and executes multi-step tasks autonomously.
properties.how_it_works: LangGraph orchestrates decision loop. GPT-4V interprets page screenshots for vision-based understanding. Playwright executes browser actions (clicks, form fills, navigation). Agent handles multi-step tasks including web search, content extraction, and form completion.

properties.description: Healthcare robot combining DeepFace emotion recognition and LangChain RAG over medical knowledge base, achieving 94% emotion detection accuracy with sub-1s conversational response latency.
properties.achievement: 94% emotion detection accuracy, sub-500ms conversational response latency
properties.what_it_is: Healthcare robot combining emotion recognition and RAG-powered medical knowledge retrieval for patient interaction.
properties.how_it_works: DeepFace detects patient emotion in real-time from camera feed. LangChain RAG retrieves relevant information from medical knowledge base based on detected emotion and patient query. Conversational response generated and delivered.

properties.description: Multimodal mood detection pipeline using DeepFace, MediaPipe, and Whisper to classify user emotional state in real time, improving Spotify recommendation relevance by 70%.
properties.what_it_is: Mood-based music recommendation app using three real-time input modalities.
properties.how_it_works: DeepFace for facial emotion detection, MediaPipe for body motion tracking, Whisper for speech-to-text. Three signals feed mood classifier which queries Spotify API for matching tracks.
